Neutral hydrogen (Z=1) inverse Mott-Bethe MB[nG+alpha] model
f_X(s) = Z - 8*pi^2*a0*s^2*[alpha + sum_i c_i*exp(-d_i*s^2)]
a0 = 0.5291772109 Angstrom,  s range [0,6] A^-1, step 0.01

n = 15
alpha = 1.898010851452e-04
c_1 = 1.202803841079e-03   d_1 = 2.951174899342e-02 A^2
c_2 = 2.318286709259e-03   d_2 = 1.023183558983e-01 A^2
c_3 = 3.754263589643e-03   d_3 = 2.276636044325e-01 A^2
c_4 = 5.807078136291e-03   d_4 = 4.246403600180e-01 A^2
c_5 = 8.971018001649e-03   d_5 = 7.287706942086e-01 A^2
c_6 = 1.401452691754e-02   d_6 = 1.202456955321e+00 A^2
c_7 = 2.205079686993e-02   d_7 = 1.950144911971e+00 A^2
c_8 = 3.453504090996e-02   d_8 = 3.141552225792e+00 A^2
c_9 = 5.282033758375e-02   d_9 = 5.048700591164e+00 A^2
c_10 = 7.634678798165e-02   d_10 = 8.104372393362e+00 A^2
c_11 = 9.846458969130e-02   d_11 = 1.299435962224e+01 A^2
c_12 = 1.028626625541e-01   d_12 = 2.081103599151e+01 A^2
c_13 = 7.428558973001e-02   d_13 = 3.334600391190e+01 A^2
c_14 = 2.831048213360e-02   d_14 = 5.380447605999e+01 A^2
c_15 = 3.241905781049e-03   d_15 = 8.951238301511e+01 A^2

Mean absolute error = 1.0826e-08
Max absolute error  = 3.7978e-08
